summary: The video depicts a snowy roadside scene viewed through a windshield with raindrops. A person stands on the right side of the road, dressed warmly. Snowbanks flank both sides of the road, and bare trees line the perimeter. As the video progresses, a vehicle approaches from the left, seemingly unaware of the person standing nearby.

events_timeline.event: A person stands on the right side of the road, dressed warmly.
A car approaches from the left side of the road.

uncertainties: Whether the person reacts to the approaching vehicle.

risk_assessment.why: The presence of a pedestrian on the roadside increases the risk of a potential collision if the vehicle fails to yield.
